text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has been struggling with exhaustion,
so I've brought her to the infirmary to get some
rest.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay, I will. Thank you, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay, I will. Thank you, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wh-where am I?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on? Am I dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But it's so pretty here. It's like a picture book.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder what'll happen if I run.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ready, set... go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Wow! I feel like I'm flying!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The sky, the fields... They're all so beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Was I... dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
For such a strange dream, that world sure was
wonderful. And my body kind of feels lighter
now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower collects herself and leaves the
infirmary with a carefree skip in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zooooom!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What was that noise?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Something dark is coming this way! It's like a wall
made of ink!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I have to get out of here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I-it's gonna get me! I can't—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! W-was I... dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew. Th-that was so scary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, unable to shake off her nightmare,
fails to get enough rest.
